name: Chicken Fajita Pizza
recipeIngredient: Whole chicken breasts (2), skinned, boned, cut into 1/2-inch strips
Bell pepper (1 cup), cut into 1/4-inch strips
Pillsbury Refrigerated All-Ready Pizza Crust, one can (10 ounces)
Mild salsa or picante sauce (½ cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add chicken; cook and stir 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
3. Stir in chili powder, salt, and garlic powder.
4. Add onions and bell pepper; cook and stir an additional 1 minute or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or 13x9-inch pan.
7. Unroll dough and place in the greased pan, starting at the center.
8. Press dough around the pan with your hands.
9. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes or until very light golden brown.
10. Spoon chicken mixture over partially baked crust.
11. Spoon salsa over chicken; sprinkle with cheese.
12. Bake an additional 14 to 18 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
6 to 8 servings.
Salsa comes in varying degrees of hotness. For a "hotter" pizza, substitute the variety you prefer.
